But hold on, I want to double check S1. The question says "CreateMarket event with exactly five parameters (collateralToken, loanToken, oracle, irm, lltv)". 

In Morpho Blue, the MarketParams struct is:
```solidity
struct MarketParams {
    address loanToken;
    address collateralToken;
    address oracle;
    address irm;
    uint256 lltv;
}
```

And the event is:
```solidity
event CreateMarket(Id indexed id, MarketParams marketParams);
```

So the event doesn't have exactly five parameters - it has an id and a MarketParams struct. But the struct has 5 fields. The question might be referring to the struct fields or might be slightly inaccurate in describing the event. Regardless, this is clearly Morpho Blue. No other protocol has this exact market structure. So "Morpho" is correct.
